name: ai-platform
description: AI Platform Enterprise - AI Gateway centralizado para Lovable, SaaS, CRM, ERP e aplicacoes multi-tenant

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/sdk-ts && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dev -w apps/api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dev -w apps/worker
